projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyBody: Create your first project — or import an existing one from an export file.
projects.deleteConfirmBody: All entities, relationships and attachments of "{{name}}" will be deleted forever. This cannot be undone.

entities.title: Entities
entities.noEntities: No entities yet. Create one — or ask the assistant to propose starting lore.
entities.noMatches: Nothing found — change the query or reset the filter.

entityEdit.deleteConfirmBody: "{{title}}" and all of its fields and relationships will be deleted forever.

entityDetail.deleteConfirmBody: "{{title}}" and all of its fields and relationships will be deleted forever.

graph.pickRoot: Pick a root entity to view its neighborhood.
graph.emptyWorld: Your world is empty — describe it in the AI panel and review the generated starting lore.
graph.largeWorldNotice: Large world — Focused mode may be easier to navigate.
graph.resetLayoutConfirmBody: Every manually placed node in view will be rearranged. This can't be undone.

fields.showOnCardTitle: Show this field on the graph card

icon.saveFirst: Save the entity first to set an icon.

richText.saveFirstForImage: Save the entity first to insert images

projectSettings.heading: Project settings
projectSettings.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g. "Write NPC descriptions in the second person", "Always add a 'plot hook' field", "Keep a dark, gothic tone".
projectSettings.instructionsHint: Free-form notes on style, tone and format — blended into the assistant's and lore-generation system prompts for this project.
projectSettings.reindexHint: The search index is rebuilt from your entities automatically, but if the assistant can't find something that clearly exists, rebuilding it here fixes that.

usage.heading: Token usage
usage.hint: Cumulative token spend for this project across all AI assistant turns, lore generation and verification runs.

knowledge.heading: Project knowledge base
knowledge.hint: Upload reference documents (rulebooks, player's handbook, a setting overview — PDF, .txt, .md, .json, .csv, .yaml and other text formats). The assistant uses them when generating lore and can search them in chat, but they never become world canon.

onboarding.restartBody: The running backend doesn't expose the AI Assistant API yet (the config endpoint returned 404). Restart it to pick up the new code:
onboarding.setupBody1: The assistant runs on your own LLM API key (BYOK) — your lore never leaves this machine except for the calls you make to your chosen provider. Current provider: {{provider}}.
onboarding.setupBody3: Then restart the backend. The key is masked in all logs and errors.

assistant.emptyInviteEmptyWorld: Your world is empty. Describe it in a couple of sentences — the assistant will propose starting lore: locations, factions, characters and their connections. Nothing becomes canon without your approval. You can also just ask questions.
assistant.emptyInviteHasWorld: Ask about the world, ask it to expand a part of it, or add new lore — the assistant answers grounded in existing canon and proposes drafts for review.
assistant.inputPlaceholderBlocked: Finish reviewing the draft above first (approve / request changes / reject)
assistant.inputPlaceholderDefault: Ask about the world or request new lore… (Enter to send)
assistant.attachTitle: Attach a file to this message (image, PDF, text)
assistant.hintIsolatedInstruction: Weave «{{title}}» into the world: figure out who and what connects to it, and add the missing entities and relationships.

review.newBadgeTitle: Entirely new — not based on existing lore
review.feedbackPlaceholder: What should change? E.g. "make the guild sinister, give it a secret leader"
review.previewBanner: This is a preview — it enters the world only after you approve.
review.groundedIn_one: Grounded in {{count}} fragment of existing lore
review.groundedIn_other: Grounded in {{count}} fragments of existing lore

warnings.budget_exhausted: Token budget for this run is exhausted — generation stopped early.
warnings.mentions_existing: The request mentions existing entity «{{title}}» ({{type}}) — the draft should connect to it, not duplicate it.
warnings.duplicate_in_batch: The draft contains two near-identical titles: «{{title_a}}» and «{{title_b}}».
warnings.dropped_unknown_source: Dropped a relationship from an unknown source ({{ref}}).
warnings.dropped_unknown_target: Dropped a relationship to an unknown target ({{ref}}) — not a draft entity or retrieved lore.
warnings.uncited_lore_id: The draft cites lore id {{id}} that was never retrieved — treat the related claim as unverified.

events.budget_exhausted_reply: Token budget for this conversation is exhausted — start a new session to continue.
events.batch_committed: Done — added {{count}} entities to the world ({{titles}}) and {{edges}} relationships.
events.batch_rejected: Draft rejected — nothing was written to the world.

errors.invalid_edge_reference: That relationship points at an entity that no longer exists.
errors.cross_project_edge: Can't link entities that belong to different projects.
errors.unsupported_export_format: This export file's format isn't supported by this version.
errors.invalid_icon_reference: That attachment doesn't belong to this entity.
errors.chat_attachment_limit_exceeded: Too many or too large attachments for one message.
errors.configuration: The AI assistant isn't configured yet — set an API key in backend/.env and restart.
errors.generation: The AI model didn't return a usable result — try again.
errors.awaiting_review_conflict: A draft is awaiting review — approve, reject or request changes before sending new messages.
errors.not_awaiting_review: This conversation isn't waiting on a review decision.
errors.timeout: The assistant took too long to respond — try again.
